message:
fix(web): add setTimeout cleanup to remaining copy handlers

Fixes memory leaks and janky behavior from setTimeout not being
cleaned up on component unmount. Added proper useRef + useEffect
cleanup pattern to:

- flywheel/page.tsx: PromptCard and ToolCard components
- tldr/page.tsx: FooterCTA component
- windows-terminal-setup/page.tsx: handleCopy function
- workflow/page.tsx: CodeBlock and PromptCard components
- command-ref-card.tsx: handleCopy function

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
